$comment: Manifest permissions policy source. Update when manifest grants, web-accessible resources, or permission ownership changes.

permissions.name: storage
permissions.feature: Shared settings, project, session, and AI provider persistence
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared browser storage adapter consumed by runtime/storage owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Callers use typed storage owners; plaintext AI secrets stay in secret stores only.
permissions.failureBehavior: Storage failures surface through owner-specific typed errors or fail-soft UI state.
permissions.justification: Persists extension settings, UI state, scenario sessions, and AI provider/model data through shared storage seams.
permissions.reviewNote: Includes browserStorage.local-backed AI provider metadata plus encrypted secret envelopes by explicit product choice; secret-storage, retention, and diagnostic guardrails must keep plaintext keys and page payloads out of persistent storage.

permissions.name: contextMenus
permissions.runtimeRoute: background context-menu registration and action dispatch
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Only background wiring registers menu actions; menu callbacks resolve action owner before side effects.
permissions.failureBehavior: Unavailable action state leaves the menu handler fail-closed without privileged fallback.
permissions.justification: Creates extension context-menu actions for capture and scenario flows in the background runtime.
permissions.reviewNote: Keep creation and handlers in the background owner seam.

permissions.name: unlimitedStorage
permissions.feature: Large local media and project retention
permissions.runtimeRoute: background media hub and shared media/project storage owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Writes stay behind media/project storage owners with explicit project or recording ownership.
permissions.failureBehavior: Quota or write failures surface as export/storage failures instead of alternate ad hoc storage.
permissions.justification: Supports large local capture/media storage beyond default quota for the media hub and export flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Retain only while local media/project storage remains a core product behavior.

permissions.name: tabs
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared tabs adapter consumed by background capture/editor/runtime routers
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Privileged tab actions stay behind route/session owners and sender-bound contracts.
permissions.failureBehavior: Missing tab access returns typed missing-tab or permission-denied results.
permissions.justification: Queries and coordinates tab metadata for capture, editor routing, and runtime orchestration.
permissions.reviewNote: All non-messaging tab access should stay behind the shared browser adapter seam.

permissions.name: webNavigation
permissions.feature: Navigation-aware runtime cleanup and session reconciliation
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Only background runtime-routing owns subscriptions and session cleanup side effects.
permissions.failureBehavior: Navigation gaps clear or reconcile volatile state rather than granting stale authority.
permissions.justification: Observes top-level navigation changes used by runtime cleanup and capture/session flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Only the background runtime should subscribe to these events.

permissions.name: debugger
permissions.feature: Full-page capture, viewport emulation, and HAR diagnostics
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared debugger adapter consumed by background capture and HAR owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Attach/detach requires the owning background route, resolved tab, and feature session.
permissions.failureBehavior: Attach denial or missing permission aborts the feature flow before debugger side effects.
permissions.justification: Supports debugger-backed capture/export diagnostics and HAR-style inspection flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Keep attach/detach and event handling behind the shared debugger adapter.

permissions.name: activeTab
permissions.runtimeRoute: background capture/editor routing from popup or explicit user actions
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Use only for user-initiated active-tab flows; do not expand it into ambient host authority.
permissions.failureBehavior: Missing active-tab grant rejects the requested flow and preserves existing tab state.
permissions.justification: Allows user-initiated capture/edit flows to access the currently active tab without broad persistent grants.
permissions.reviewNote: Treat as user-gesture-scoped; do not use as a substitute for registry-driven host permissions.

permissions.name: scripting
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared scripting adapter consumed by background-owned feature routes
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Injection targets and scripts are selected by owner routes, not arbitrary UI or content callers.
permissions.failureBehavior: Injection denial returns a typed feature failure before downstream assumptions run.
permissions.justification: Injects or executes runtime scripts through the canonical browser scripting adapter.
permissions.reviewNote: Use only through the shared adapter and keep target scripts deterministic.

permissions.name: downloads
permissions.feature: Capture, recording, project, and archive downloads
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared downloads adapter consumed by background export/download owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Download requests are routed through owning background/export flows with normalized filenames.
permissions.failureBehavior: Download denial or cancellation prevents partial archive/download creation.
permissions.justification: Exports captures, projects, and generated assets through browser downloads flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Downloads remain background-owned even when triggered from UI surfaces.

permissions.name: offscreen
permissions.feature: Recording and export composition offscreen document
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared offscreen adapter with background/offscreen lifecycle owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Only background-owned recording/export sessions create or tear down offscreen work.
permissions.failureBehavior: Creation failure rejects the session before media/export state is committed.
permissions.justification: Creates and manages the offscreen document used for recording and export composition jobs.
permissions.reviewNote: Keep lifecycle orchestration centralized in the background/offscreen owners.

permissions.name: tabCapture
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared tab-capture adapter consumed by background capture-mode owners
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Capture starts only for the owning capture session and resolved tab capability.
permissions.failureBehavior: Permission denial fails the recording mode before offscreen export or UI commit.
permissions.justification: Captures tab media streams for recording flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Use through shared tab-capture adapters only.

permissions.name: desktopCapture
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared desktop-capture adapter consumed by background desktop-capture source selection
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Desktop source selection stays behind the background screen/window policy and active capture request.
permissions.failureBehavior: Cancelled or denied source selection aborts capture without reusable authority.
permissions.justification: Captures full-screen or window media sources when the product records outside a single tab.
permissions.reviewNote: Use through shared desktop-capture adapter and background source-picker policy only.

permissions.name: nativeMessaging
permissions.feature: Native tray-agent connection for extension-owned screenshot, recording, settings sync, tray actions, and safe telemetry transfer
permissions.runtimeRoute: background native-app runtime owner under apps/extension/src/background/runtime/native-app with settings-page query/mutation routes
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Only the background native-app owner calls connectNative with a channel-scoped host name; popup/content/settings surfaces do not connect directly. Unsupported protocol/settings/schema/install states fail closed before operational commands.
permissions.failureBehavior: Missing, policy-denied, incompatible, repair-required, or other-profile controller states surface as typed native status while browser-only capture and recording remain available.
permissions.justification: Allows the extension to communicate with the browser-launched Native Messaging host used by the Sniptale native tray agent.
permissions.reviewNote: Keep Native Messaging access behind packages/platform/src/browser/native-messaging.ts and apps/extension/src/background/runtime/native-app; production builds must not connect to dev host names.

permissions.name: clipboardWrite
permissions.feature: Copy exported content and generated assets
permissions.runtimeRoute: shared clipboard adapter or narrow feature-local runtime helper
permissions.capabilityPolicy: Clipboard writes stay in explicit user-triggered feature flows with normalized payloads.
permissions.failureBehavior: Clipboard failure reports copy failure without falling back to hidden persistence.
permissions.justification: Copies exported content and generated assets to the clipboard from popup, content, and scenario-editor flows.
permissions.reviewNote: Prefer shared clipboard adapters or narrow runtime helpers; avoid ad hoc clipboard writes.

optionalHostPermissions.name: <all_urls>
optionalHostPermissions.feature: Optional persistent page tooling and native visible capture authority for shim-restored HTTP/HTTPS pages
optionalHostPermissions.runtimeRoute: PAGE_ACCESS background-owned route with dynamic top-frame content runtime shim registration, lazy full-runtime injection, and native visible capture routes
optionalHostPermissions.capabilityPolicy: Optional all-sites access is requested only from extension UI; dynamic content script matches remain owner-registered, HTTP/HTTPS-only, and top-frame only.
optionalHostPermissions.failureBehavior: Denied or revoked grants leave page tooling inactive; unsupported pages fail closed; visible capture routes use native tabs.captureVisibleTab and do not fall back to debugger for missing activeTab.
optionalHostPermissions.justification: Shim-restored hotkeys and scenario captures run outside Chrome activeTab user-invocation events, and Chrome tabs.captureVisibleTab checks for literal <all_urls> or activeTab. The all-sites permission therefore has to be the optional literal grant rather than split HTTP/HTTPS origins.
optionalHostPermissions.reviewNote: Keep optional host access usage centralized in apps/extension/src/background/runtime/page-access and capture routes; do not add required host_permissions, source manifest content_scripts, or debugger fallback for normal visible capture.

webAccessibleResources.name: web_accessible_resources:{"resources":["fonts/manrope-cyrillic-wght-normal.woff2","fonts/manrope-latin-ext-wght-normal.woff2","fonts/manrope-latin-wght-normal.woff2"],"matches":["http://*/*","https://*/*"],"extensionIds":[],"useDynamicUrl":true}
webAccessibleResources.feature: Content runtime font rendering on HTTP and HTTPS pages
webAccessibleResources.runtimeRoute: content runtime shadow-DOM CSS loaded through chrome.runtime.getURL font URLs
webAccessibleResources.capabilityPolicy: Expose only the exact Manrope font files required by extension-owned content UI; injected JavaScript bundles remain non-web-accessible.
webAccessibleResources.failureBehavior: Missing font assets fall back to system fonts without expanding web-accessible JavaScript exposure.
webAccessibleResources.justification: Allows the injected content runtime to render the extension UI consistently after host-page injection.
webAccessibleResources.reviewNote: Keep resources concrete, dynamic-url scoped, and avoid wildcard WAR entries for injected runtime bundles.
